events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. Scenario: field condition for Loop checks & wiring compared with referenced drawing or manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, layout callouts line up with installed work, revision block current. Reference material: loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Stage tested/inspected. No component conditions flagged. Need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since everything lines up and revision current, pass. Risk low. Work_stage tested/inspected. Percent_complete maybe 100? Loop checks & wiring tested/inspected, likely complete. Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string? Schema says string for sound_source, event_time number, rate number, order array, workable array. Use empty string, 0.0, empty arrays. Findings none. Actions none. Rationale brief. References loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need ensure valid JSON.
